description: SWIFT MT to MX (ISO 20022) Full Mapping with MX Mandatory XML Field Validation

MsgId.description: Unique Message ID - mapped from MT Field 20

CreDtTm.description: Creation Date Time - ISO 8601 format e.g. 2024-01-15T10:30:00

NbOfTxs.description: Number of Transactions - always 1 for MT103

EndToEndId.description: End-to-End ID - mapped from MT Field 20. Use NOTPROVIDED if not available.

TxId.description: Transaction ID - mapped from MT Field 20

IntrBkSttlmAmt.description: Interbank Settlement Amount and Currency from MT Field 32A

IBAN.description: Use IBAN if account starts with 2 letters + digits

Othr.description: Use Othr/Id if account is not IBAN format

Id.validation_note: Either IBAN or Othr must be present, not both
Either IBAN or Othr must be present

Strd.description: Structured remittance - used for MT103 REMIT from field 77T

MT103_REMIT.description: Single Customer Credit Transfer with Remittance Info
MT103_REMIT.note: Same as MT103 MX structure but RmtInf/Strd is populated from field 77T

mx_mandatory_xml_fields.note: Identical to MT103 pacs.008 structure - refer to MT103 block. Additional field:

RmtInf_Strd.description: Structured remittance info from 77T envelope contents

EndToEndId.description: Use NOTPROVIDED if field 21 is absent

MT202COV.note: Same header as MT202 but must include UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf block

UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf.description: CRITICAL - This block is MANDATORY for MT202COV. Missing this causes MX validation failure.

OrgnlEndToEndId.description: Original End to End ID, mandatory in CBPR+

IBAN.description: Use IBAN if account is IBAN format

Id.validation_note: Either IBAN or Othr must be present

Bal.description: At least 2 balances required: Opening (OPBD) and Closing (CLBD)

MT950.note: Same MX structure as MT940. Refer to MT940 mx_mandatory_xml_fields block.

MT910.note: Same MX structure as MT900 but CdtDbtInd = CRDT

OrgnlEndToEndId.description: Original End to End Id - often mapped from 21

MT102.note: Maps to multiple CdtTrfTxInf blocks in MX

MT201.description: Multiple FI Transfer for Own Account

common_mx_rules.NOTPROVIDED_rule: If a mandatory MX field cannot be mapped from the MT message, use the value NOTPROVIDED
common_mx_rules.datetime_conversion: MT date YYMMDD must be converted to ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS (use 00:00:00 if time is unknown)
common_mx_rules.amount_conversion: MT amount uses comma as decimal separator (1000,50). MX uses period (1000.50)
